title: Crocus Calms the Whale
description: On pages 14–17, crocus calms the whale as inside the whale, the crew meets Crocus and begins to understand Laboon’s pain and strange living arrangements.
scene: Crocus Calms the Whale. Inside the whale, the crew meets Crocus and begins to understand Laboon’s pain and strange living arrangements. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Crocus
dialogue.text: Stop hurting yourself.

dialogue.speaker: Crocus
dialogue.text: I don't have much sedatives left. Looks like I need to go make some more...

dialogue.speaker: Laboon
dialogue.text: BUO OHhh!

dialogue.speaker: Crocus
dialogue.text: that wall before you separates the oceans of the world.

dialogue.speaker: Crocus
dialogue.text: You won't be able to bring it down even if you keep on bashing it until you die...!

dialogue.speaker: Crocus
dialogue.text: So please stop, Laboon.

dialogue.speaker: Laboon
dialogue.text: BUOO Hhh...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: BLUB

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: The whale seems to have calmed down...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Well?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Just who exactly are you guys...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: M...Mr.9, these people are pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Y-Yes I know, Miss Wednesday. But they seem understanding enough.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I won't let you lay even a single finger on Laboon,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: For as long as I live!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Who's that old man?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Oh, he's back...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Fufufu...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Oh...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But we're inside the whale now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It'll be only too easy,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: to blast a hole in its stomach?

dialogue.speaker: Crocus
dialogue.text: We won't let you interfere in our whaling business any longer!

dialogue.speaker: Crocus
dialogue.text: Damn Rogers...!

dialogue.speaker: Crocus
dialogue.text: That old man took the blast with his own body!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What... So then, he's been protecting the whale...!?

dialogue.speaker: Crocus
dialogue.text: Ohooo- hoho! cease your futile resis- Tance!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Just try to protect the whale if you still can! But it won't stop our town from using this whale as our food!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What... Why is that old man...?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What's going on!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Guh!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm not sure what's going on but I'll knock these guys out for now!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on crocus calms the whale. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
